results.title: Ecuador send new FIFA demand after Mexico chaos as England braced for World Cup disruption
results.description: Ecuador have issued a new statement following their FIFA complaint before facing England's next World Cup opponents, Mexico

results.title: Rice hits go-ahead 2-run homer as Yanks stop 7-game skid with 5-2 victory over Twins
results.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ben Rice hit go-ahead two-run homer in the third inning after a rain delay and the New York Yankees ended a seven-game losing streak with a 5-2 victory over the Minnesota Twins on Friday night.

results.title: Junior Caminero Named AL Player of the Month as Rays Make Franchise History
results.description: Junior Caminero is the AL Player of the Month after a historic June, while Drew Rasmussen earns AL Pitcher of the Month as the Rays lead the AL East. We break down Tampa Bay's 8-game winning streak, MVP and Cy Young races, and MLB trade deadline outlook.
